_comment: Archetype-to-silhouette-descriptor mapping. Consumed by SilhouetteAssetCatalogJsonTests and used as a reference when populating SilhouetteAssetCatalog.asset sprite arrays. All archetypes from cast-bible.md are represented. dominantColor values are #RRGGBB hex. hairLength and hairColor are informational only at v0.1 — SilhouetteComponent.Hair carries the combined value. Build values use 'slight' (not 'slim') to match cast-bible.md terminology; the WP design notes used 'slim' which was reconciled to 'slight' here.

archetypes._note: Donna archetype. Short, stocky, long-tenured. Dark plum from the original NpcDotRenderer palette (AT-03 anchor).
Greg archetype. Tall, slight frame, lanyard (IT). Pale yellow-green from WP spec (AT-03 anchor).
Frank archetype (inferred from 'thicker round-shouldered, coffee mug, brown' in WP spec). Average height, stocky, perpetual coffee mug.
HR / mid-tier admin. High extraversion, casual-direct register. Phone is their ever-present item.
Mid-tier on exec track. Sharp posture, clipboard. Corporate blue.
Entry-level. Eager posture, carries folder. Fresh green.
Has something going on. Nervous energy, phone always in hand. Purple hue.
Stable on surface. Teal — calm, slightly washed out.
Performs at 40%. Cap is the visual tell. Gold — unearned confidence.
Someone has a crush on them; they don't know yet. Soft rose — approachable, unaware.
